chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1787 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 7131/25 2.For orders on o/objections. 3.For orders on CMA 7132/25 4.For orders on CMA 7233/25 5.For hearing of main case 23-10-2025 Syed Amjad Ali Shah, Advocate for the petitioner. **** 1. Urgency is granted. 2to5. Counsel for petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition and submits that after curing some legal defects he will file petition afresh. Order accordingly. Instant petition along with listed applications stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
